title: Y9 Revision
details: Ensure you consolidate this week's learning by going over the PowerPoints and checking your class notes. If absent, catch up on Lessons 14 and 15.
subject: English

title: Spheres and Cones
details: Complete the assignment in Dr Frost on this topic. This will be followed by the usual written assessment in Monday lesson.
subject: Maths

title: Living World - TRF Tropical Rainforest Loss
details: Geography homework on tropical rainforest loss.
subject: Geography

title: ALE - Database Completion and Hand-in
details: Create an independently-built database. Must include at least 4 data types, minimum 12 records with images, a styled form suitable for a workplace, a report fitting one A4 page, and at least one query using complex criteria (AND/OR).
subject: Computing

title: 5.1 J'y retourne
details: Learn the vocab copied for a test. Complete WBK activities 5.1.
subject: French

title: HW Vocabulary learning
details: Spend 25 minutes learning vocabulary on Suburani online. Aim for 100% Chapters 1-16.
subject: Latin

title: Practical 2 - Curry
details: Food technology practical. Bring apron and container to take food home. Recipe: spinach and potatoes curry.
subject: Food Technology

title: Romeo and Juliet assessment
details: Year 9 Romeo and Juliet assessment. Review class notes and check the CRE document for expectations.

references.label: Romeo and Juliet Y9 CRE Student Version

subject: English

title: END OF UNIT Test - L, R, T and W
details: German end of unit test covering Listening, Reading, Translation and Writing.
subject: German

title: Translation Bee STAGE 2
details: Come to ML4 at 12:45 for the competition. Must know present and future tense sentences. Best two students progress to the regional finals.
subject: German
